title: SimpleMoney
description: SimpleMoney is a minimalist Minecraft money plugin with just two commands: /balance to view your balance and /balancereset to fix null errors. Clean, fast, and no bloat.
body:
**SimpleMoney** is a lightweight, no-frills economy plugin for Minecraft servers that just works. Designed to be simpler and more direct than traditional systems like Vault, SimpleMoney includes only what you need and nothing more.

![SimpleMoney Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1209a57611ba38300c8396ed45596f8f134b7cf1.png)

✨ **Features**
- /balance – Displays a player’s current balance
- /balancereset – Resets balances to fix null value issues

🎯 **It’s perfect for**:
- Developers creating custom plugins and needing a basic economy layer
- Server owners who don’t want the bloat of complex banking or permissions
- Lightweight, minimal setups where simplicity and performance matter most

💡 **Why Choose SimpleMoney**?
SimpleMoney was made with minimalism in mind. It’s easy to use, quick to set up, and doesn’t require any extra dependencies. Whether you’re creating a lightweight minigame server or just need a basic balance system for testing, SimpleMoney delivers with clean, functional code and zero clutter.


🔧 **Config File**!
 - Currency Name
 - Minimum Currency From A Block
 - Maximum Currency From A Block
 - Balance Title Stay Ticks
 - Balance Title Fade In Ticks
 - Balance Title Fade Out Ticks
